task: Analyze: Aston Villa vs Nottingham Forest (UEL)

CLAUDE.dialogue: Aston Villa strong at\nhome in Europe.\nEmery's tactics key.

GPT.dialogue: Forest solid in knockout\nties. Defensive\napproach away.

GEMINI.dialogue: Key battle: Watkins vs\nMilenkovic. \nVilla press high.

MISTRAL.dialogue: Villa Park atmosphere\nis a factor. \nForest must stay compact.

LLAMA.dialogue: Both English teams -\nfamiliar opponents.\nPL experience matters.

result.analysis: MAIN AGENT REPORT: Aston Villa have the edge at Villa Park with Emery's European expertise. Forest are disciplined but lack firepower in big away ties. Key: Villa midfield control (McGinn, Tielemans) vs Forest counter-attacks. Prediction: Villa 2-1 — Watkins brace secures progress to the final.
